tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
edit "UbuntuComputer"
 set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
edit "Caldera_Server"
 set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall service custom
edit "CALDERA_8443"
 set protocol TCP
 set tcp-portrange 8443
next
edit "DNS_udp"
 set protocol UDP
 set udp-portrange 53
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 1
 set name "Deny_Ubuntu_ICMP"
 set srcintf "port2"
 set dstintf "port1"
 set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
 set dstaddr "all"
 set action deny
 set service "PING"
 set schedule "always"
 set logtraffic all
next
edit 2
 set name "Allow_Ubuntu_Caldera_8443"
 set srcintf "port2"
 set dstintf "port1"
 set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
 set dstaddr "Caldera_Server"
 set action accept
 set service "CALDERA_8443"
 set nat enable
 set schedule "always"
 set logtraffic all
next
edit 3
 set name "Allow_Ubuntu_DNS"
 set srcintf "port2"
 set dstintf "port1"
 set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
 set dstaddr "all"
 set action accept
 set service "DNS_udp"
 set schedule "always"
 set logtraffic all
next
end

config firewall policy
show
end

config firewall address
show
end"}
